analysis:
Based on your framework analysis:

**Best CSP**: PLTR $125 strike, 2026-07-17 expiry, 42 DTE, $2.95/$3.05 bid/ask, 0.20 delta, 20.9% annualized return
- Excellent timing with 81% IVP + near 52w low

**Best CC**: GOOGL $395 strike, 2026-07-17 expiry, 42 DTE, $8.45/$8.65 bid/ask, 0.32 delta, 20.0% annualized return
- Strong setup near highs with elevated volatility

**Best Position Income CC**: NBIS $320 strike, 2026-07-17 expiry, 42 DTE, $20.00/$20.50 bid/ask, 0.36 delta, 67.3% annualized return
- Massive profit position with excellent premium

**LEAPS**: No qualifying trades - all showing trend warnings (AT_LOWS/STILL_FALLING) or expensive IVP

**Bull Call Spreads**: None available

**IVP Environment**: Mixed volatility landscape - PLTR/MSFT/NBIS elevated (81-91%), tech giants moderate (30-61%), creating selective premium selling opportunities.
